title: Utris M'Toc

'''Utris M'Toc''' was a former member of the [[High King's Guard]] on the [[Planet/Legends|planet]] [[Couronne/Legends|Couronne]], but a [[Blood/Legends|bloody]] coup forced him to leave his [[Homeworld/Legends|homeworld]]. He later became a leader of the [[Bespin Wing Guard/Legends|Wing Guard]] [[Law enforcement agency/Legends|security force]] on [[Bespin/Legends|Bespin's]] [[Cloud City/Legends|Cloud City]], working to protect the local [[Bespinite/Legends|citizenry]] from corruption in his own ranks. Honest and efficient, M'Toc never took a bribe in the course of his duties.

==Biography==
Utris M'Toc hailed from the [[Imzig]] [[Homeworld/Legends|homeworld]] of [[Couronne/Legends|Couronne]], where<ref name="Rogues Gallery" /> he<ref name="Action Figure Archive" /> once served as a member of the [[High King's Guard]]. However, he was forced to leave<ref name="Rogues Gallery" /> his [[Species/Legends|species']] [[Planet/Legends|planet]]<ref name="SW article">{{SW|url=news/star-wars-maps-charting-the-galaxy|text=''Star Wars'' Maps: Charting the Galaxy|nolive=1}}</ref> following a [[Blood/Legends|bloody]] coup.<ref name="Rogues Gallery" />

Eventually, M'Toc joined the elite [[Bespin Wing Guard/Legends|Wing Guard]] in charge of security on<ref name="Legacy Collection">{{HasbroCite|set=Star Wars: Legacy Collection|pack=#50: Cloud City Wing Guard (Utris M'Toc)|altlink=https://www.rebelscum.com/TLCBD50WingUtris.asp}}</ref> the planet [[Bespin/Legends|Bespin's]] [[Cloud City/Legends|Cloud City]].<ref name="DB">{{DB|organization|bespinwingguard|Wing Guard}}</ref> Under the leadership of [[City/Legends|city]] [[Baron Administrator/Legends|Baron Administrator]] [[Lando Calrissian/Legends|Lando Calrissian]],<ref name="Rogues Gallery" /> who ushered in a new era of public accountability in the formerly corrupt Wing Guard,<ref name="DB" /> M'Toc worked to protect Cloud City's [[Bespinite/Legends|citizens]] from the less reputable members of the local [[Law enforcement agency/Legends|constabulary]].<ref name="Cloud City Limited" /> M'Toc became an enemy of [[Bislav Merril]], a tyrannical Wing Guard [[Commanding officer/Legends|commander]] who treated his fellow Cloud City [[Trooper/Legends|troopers]] with disdain.<ref name="Special Edition Limited">{{CCG|set=Special Edition Limited|cardname=Sergeant Merril}}</ref>

In [[3 ABY/Legends|3 ABY]], during the [[Galactic Civil War/Legends|Galactic Civil War]], M'Toc was present in Cloud City as [[Galactic Empire/Legends|Imperial]] [[Imperial Military/Legends|forces]] led by<ref name="Note">{{InsiderCite|148|Rogues Gallery|Rogues Gallery: The Cloud City Wing Guards}} identifies members of the [[Bespin Wing Guard/Legends|Bespin Wing Guard]], including Utris M'Toc, who were active during the events of [[Star Wars: Episode V The Empire Strikes Back|''Star Wars'': Episode V ''The Empire Strikes Back'']], which encompasses the [[Galactic Empire/Legends|Galactic Empire's]] [[Occupation of Bespin|seizure of Cloud City]] amid [[Anakin Skywalker/Legends|Darth Vader's]] hunt for the [[Alliance to Restore the Republic/Legends|Rebel Alliance]]. ''[[The New Essential Chronology]]'' dates these events to [[3 ABY/Legends|3 ABY]], during the [[Galactic Civil War/Legends|Galactic Civil War]].</ref> the [[Dark Lord of the Sith/Legends|Dark Lord of the Sith]]<ref name="CSWE-Darth Vader">{{CSWECite|III||Vader, Darth}}</ref> [[Anakin Skywalker/Legends|Darth Vader]] arrived in pursuit of [[Alliance to Restore the Republic/Legends|Rebel Alliance]] [[Heroes of Yavin/Legends|agents]].<ref name="Note" /> The subsequent Imperial [[Occupation of Bespin|takeover of Cloud City]] forced Calrissian to flee Bespin,<ref name="ESB">{{Film|V}}</ref> while the responsibility fell to the Wing Guards to do whatever they could to save their city from the Empire.<ref name="Power of the Jedi">{{HasbroCite|set=Star Wars: Power of the Jedi|pack=Bespin Guard (Cloud City Security)|altlink=https://www.rebelscum.com/potjbespinguard.asp}}</ref>

==Personality and traits==
[[File:Imzig-SWAFA.jpg|thumb|right|150px|Utris M'Toc's Bespin Wing Guard uniform featured unique gold piping.]]
As a leader of the Bespin Wing Guard,<ref name="Cloud City Limited" /> Utris M'Toc took on the crucial duties of Cloud City security with honesty and efficiency.<ref name="Legacy Collection" /> He attempted to shield the people of Cloud City against the corruption found within the Wing Guard.<ref name="Cloud City Limited" /> Unlike other Cloud City troopers,<ref name="Jerrol Blendin">{{CCG|set=Cloud City Limited|cardname=Trooper Jerrol Blendin}}</ref> M'Toc never accepted a bribe.<ref name="Cloud City Limited" /> A member of the<ref name="Action Figure Archive" /> [[Humanoid/Legends|humanoid]]<ref name="CSWE-Imzig">{{CSWECite|II|99|Imzig}}</ref> Imzig species, M'Toc had light skin with touches of [[Color/Legends|blue]] on his face, and light-brown [[Hair/Legends|hair]].<ref name="Rogues Gallery" />

==Equipment==
Utris M'Toc wore the dark-blue [[Clothing/Legends|uniform]] of the Bespin Wing Guard. His tunic was uniquely adorned with gold piping along the collar, [[Limb/Legends|arms]], and bottom trim, and he donned a unique gold neck treatment. He also wore a [[Gold/Legends|gold]] [[Ring/Legends|ring]] on his left third finger.<ref name="Action Figure Archive" /> M'Toc armed himself with a [[Relby-k23 blaster pistol]] and a [[Baton/Legends|baton]], which he kept [[Holster/Legends|holstered]] on his left and right hips, respectively.<ref name="Legacy Collection" />

==Behind the scenes==
The character of Utris M'Toc originated in the [[November]] [[1997]] ''[[Cloud City Limited]]'' expansion set of the [[Star Wars Customizable Card Game|''Star Wars'' Customizable Card Game]] from [[Decipher]] The set's [https://www.starwarsccg.org/cardlists/images/starwars/CloudCity-Light/large/trooperutrismtoc.gif "Trooper Utris M'Toc" card] features a still photo of an exotic-looking [[Alien/Legends|alien]] [[Security guard/Legends|security guard]] against a Cloud City backdrop, ostensibly from<ref name="Cloud City Limited" /> the [[1980]] [[original trilogy]] film, [[Star Wars: Episode V The Empire Strikes Back|''Star Wars'': Episode V ''The Empire Strikes Back'']].<ref name="ESB" /> The makeup was designed by [[Nick Maley]] and then later applied by [[Graham Freeborn]].<ref name="UtrisEmail">{{EmailCite|email=File:MaleyEmailUtris.png|creator=[[Nick Maley]]|date=2025-11-09}}</ref>

According to ''[[Star Wars]]'' author [[Stephen J. Sansweet]], this alien guard was considered for use in ''The Empire Strikes Back'' but was apparently never filmed<ref name="Action Figure Archive" /> and can only be seen in still production photos taken on set.<ref name="Action Figure Collection">''[[Star Wars: The Ultimate Action Figure Collection]]''</ref> In writing the [[1999]] reference book ''[[Star Wars: The Action Figure Archive]]'', Sansweet further noted the unique gold trim seen on the character's uniform, different from other Bespin Wing Guards. He speculated that this presumably indicated [[Officer/Legends|officer]] [[Military rank/Legends|rank]].<ref name="Action Figure Archive" />

All sources to mention Utris M'Toc by name format his surname as "M'Toc,"<ref name="Cloud City Limited" /><ref name="Legacy Collection" /><ref name="Special Edition Limited" /><ref name="Action Figure Collection" /><ref name="Edian">{{HasbroCite|set=Star Wars: Legacy Collection|pack=#50: Cloud City Wing Guard (Sergeant Edian)|altlink=https://www.rebelscum.com/TLCBD50WingEdian.asp}}</ref> with the exception of the [[2014]] [[Star Wars Insider 148|''Star Wars Insider'' 148]] article "[[Rogues Gallery (department)|Rogues Gallery: The Cloud City Wing Guard]]," which alternatively styles the name as "M'toc."<ref name="Rogues Gallery" />
